facades.name: createParallelCoordinates

repairs.scope: createBoxPlot resolves data as explicit, source, current, then unique dataset and rejects ambiguity
createBoxPlot accepts guides?: false | CreateGuidesOptions; omission and false preserve no guides while an explicit object creates applicable guides
createBoxPlot reports ambiguous inferred source explicitly before authoring child state
BoxPlotOptions is exported from the package root like the other public facade option types

nonGoals: one identical signature for every facade
new chart facade or aggregate edit action
duplicating every advanced child option on a facade
moving mutable composite contracts out of their canonical statistical owners
